title: Cabinet Gemini maintenance scan lanes
goal: Introduce Gemini only as a read-only semantic maintenance scout for Cabinet, with capability preflight, strict no-effect contracts, curated evidence packets, one reviewed dry run, and a separate schedule decision.
completion: Gemini is not schedulable until capability and sandbox preflight evidence exists.
Any scan output is artifact-only and cannot create tasks, issues, PRs, comments, dispatches, queue mutations, runtime actions, pushes or merges.
Only the first dry run may inform a later scheduling decision.

source_context: User request: register the plan as Bureau queue tasks
